title: Hire through the Home Care Worker Immigration pilots - Find a home care worker - Canada.ca
content:
## Find a home care worker
The Home Care Worker Immigration pilots don’t match home care workers with jobs . You can find a home care worker on your own, or they can approach you.

## Understand home care worker requirements
Before you hire a home care worker through the pilots, find out if they meet the requirements .

## Encourage home workers to get their documents ready
Home care workers must submit specific documents with their permanent residence application. Encourage your home care worker to start getting these documents ready even before you make the job offer, because some of these documents take time to get. These documents include
- results of a language test showing they can communicate in English or French
- an educational credential assessment report , which shows how their education compares to a Canadian credential, if the candidate studied outside Canada
- proof of work experience or training
